# terrible_community_general_cargo (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The name of a Rust package to install.

### Optional

- `directory` (String) Path to the source directory to install the Rust package from. This is only used when installing packages.
- `executable` (String) Path to the `cargo` installed in the system. If not specified, the module looks for `cargo` in `PATH`.
- `features` (String) List of features to activate. This is only used when installing packages.
- `locked` (Boolean) Install with locked dependencies. This is only used when installing packages.
- `path` (String) The base path where to install the Rust packages. Cargo automatically appends `/bin`. In other words, `/usr/local` becomes `/usr/local/bin`.
- `state` (String) The state of the Rust package.
- `version` (String) The version to install. If `name` contains multiple values, the module tries to install all of them in this version.
